summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC are not propagated to the Poly Studio Mobile Android app on Free20
description_clean: Changes to Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) made on PC are not propagated to the Android mobile app when changed on PC. This affects devices that support Voice prompts and tones (tested on Free20). Expected behavior: Changing settings on one platform should be properly propagated to every other platform.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] (e.g., Free20) → Device Settings.
3. Verify current Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore).
4. On a PC, open Poly Lens Desktop or the appropriate Poly software for the device.
5. Change one or more Voice Prompts & Tones settings (e.g., disable Hold Reminder, change Incoming Call tone).
6. Sync or reconnect the device to the Android phone (e.g., disconnect and reconnect Bluetooth).
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android again.
8. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
9. Compare the displayed settings with the changes made on PC.
expected: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC should be reflected in the Poly Studio Mobile Android app after syncing.
actual: Changes made on PC are not propagated to the Android mobile app. The app still shows the previous settings.
